entry.title: Re: Do Virtual Tables support ST_POINT or ST_GEOMETRY
entry.content:
Hej, Virtual Tables do support spatial datatypes, but you can not create a virtual table AND the remote table with a spatial datatype in one statement.

This works if the reomte table contains a spatial datatype:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE "schema"."virtual table" AT "remotesys"."<NULL>"."schema"."remote table";

This fails:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE "schema"."virtual table" ("ID" BIGINT, "GEO" ST_GEOMETRY(4326))
AT "remotesys"."<NULL>"."schema"."remote table" WITH REMOTE;

So, I guess you need "revrese" your data migration - connecting from the target system to your (remote) source system. The source systems contains the geo data. In the target system, you create a virtual table and select from it.

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Dear David,

I am Umesh 42years old, I am a highly motivated individual with over 20 years of experience in finance and costing. At this stage in my career, I am eager to transition into the IT field and have identified SAP as a promising avenue for professional growth.

I am particularly interested in your SAP learning program as a means to acquire the necessary skills to embark on this career change. I am confident that obtaining a SAP certification will significantly enhance my career prospects within the IT industry.

I am interested in learning SAP as beginner, and change my career in midlife under this initiative.

Thank you for considering my application.

UmeshOC

entry.title: NVE number and setup in EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new in EWM, I have a question regarding NVE number range.

Do we need to use NVE number range for HUs which will be delivered to actual customer, so in outbound process only? 

Or in other words only for the packaging materials that will be use to pack the finish material to customer? 

And do we need to maintain NVE number range in /SCWM/SSCC?

entry.title: Re: BKPF-XBLNR (Reference Field is not changeable)
entry.content:
Hi,

Is your system S/4 HANA?
Have you confirmed that there are entries for BSEG in SE16N?

If does not exist, please check table ACDOCA, this is a table integrating financial module data.

If the data is in the table, it cannot be changed

entry.title: How to do reversal of picking in case of mixed handling Units?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using Cancpick tcode for canceling of picking , which works ok when it comes to 1 delivery in 1 HU.

However I get into trouble if I have multiple deliveries in 1 HU, what is the process of canceling picking in this case?

entry.title: Re: SD Workflow
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible. 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2570961

How to create Business Users in SAP S/4HANA - HCM Integration is Inactive

There are three options to create business users:

  • Business users can be created in SAP S/4HANA by using the following Fiori apps (including CSV import for mass processing):

Fiori ID

App Title

Business Partner Role Category

As Of Release

Comments

F2288A

Maintain Employees

BUP003

2020 FPS01

 

F2288

Maintain Employees

BUP003

1709 FPS02

Replaced by Fiori app F2288A.

F4911

Maintain Collaboration Users

BUP012

2020 FPS01

 

F3505A

Maintain External Resources

BBP005

2020 FPS01

 

F3505

Maintain Resources

WFM001

1809 FPS01

Only needed for SAP Portfolio and Project Management (component PPM-PFM-RES).

  • For mass maintenance, you can also use the report RFS4BPU_IMPORT_BUSINESS_USER (As of SAP S/4HANA 1809). For SAP S/4HANA 1610 you can use report RFS4BPU_EMPLOYEE_UPLOAD - see SAP Note 2567604.
  • SOAP Service ManageBusinessUserIn - can be set up via SOA Manager (Transaction SOAMANAGER).

entry.title: Re: POD via IDoc [STPPOD]
entry.content:
Hello Prabhu,

The E1EDL53 Segment should appear in your STPPOD IDoc  only if you have quantity difference between the IDoc and delivery. POD is confirmed (status green) in this case.

When you have quantity difference then only in this case the Segment E1EDL53 should appear in the STPPOD IDoc and in this case the POD should remain in status gelb (not confirmed).

That is the normal behavior of the POD booking.

Best Regards,

Elena

entry.title: Re: SoD review request generated for only one user
entry.content: Hello, Did you receive solution for this? I am also facing the same problem

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Date Filtering
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

I am using two restricted key figures. One key figure is controlled via a Date Input Control for filtering a specific date, and the second key figure is controlled via a Calculation Input Control for filtering another specific date. To my knowledge, it is not possible to use two Date Input Controls in one story. Now, I have a chart (Numeric Point) that shows me the value for the first date and a variance deviation to the second date. The requirement is: The user should have the possibility to select both dates on all pages of the dashboard. However, a Calculation Input Control cannot be copied to other pages. How could I work around this problem? I would prefer not to create new Calculation Input Controls on each page and define new key figures for each page.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previo...
entry.content:
@Charlielin The free Rapid FP&A Suite from SAP has an example of a story that does this. The user selects a Month (e.g., September 2024) and can then get the MTD, QTD, and YTD values for this year and last year.

The key is the configuration and layout of the restricted measures. You can also create a restricted measure to create a prior month value.  I took a screenshot of the data selection and a couple of examples of the restricted measures, but the Rapid FP&A download shows you how it is all put together 100% in a sample solution from SAP.  You can basically browse the story and see it working and use what you need!

Note that on each restricted measure in the attached images, you will see a "visual" cue of what time period is being shown, all based on the single Selection Date (September 2024). You can change that Select Date to another month and get relevant results for that date, allowing you to "step back in time."

It is in the Rapid Finance (FPA) model and in the Dashboard story in the second tab, which gets delivered with a model, stories, restricted measures, and sample data so you can see how it works and apply it to your model. We also have a variation of the same concept in the Rapid Sales model—Dashboard Story—Sales Analysis in tab 2.

We have a new version coming out on August 19, 2024, so I suggest waiting to download it.  Download instructions for best practice content Rapid FP&A are HERE

Thanks,

Mark P Burke, SAP

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: TASK 2. Here we GOOO!!!

entry.title: Re: how to run a select query from _SYS_BIC with a parameter
entry.content: Hello, this approach applied to UDQ when using a calculation view or procedure. In case of the pervasive dashboard in B1 HANA, please use the filter and parameter in the pervasive dashboard designer. refer to the how-to-guide for more details - https://help.sap.com/doc/d07db3419ead4e7c821ddc07c601287d/10.0/en-US/How_to_Work_with_Pervasive_Analytics_in_SAP_Business_One_version_for_SAP_HANA.pdf .

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: Good to hear. Actually yes, I have been customizing, extending, troubleshooting and giving PowerDesigner traninings full time for the last 16 years. So in case you are interested in some more complex extension / scripting in PowerDesigner or any kind of PD training, feel free to contact me. That is what I do. You can send me direct message here or you can find me on LinkedIn. Have a nice day. Ondrej.

entry.title: Re: Visual purchase requisitions: SAP Build Apps and S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi! Very nice and helpful blog post. 

I am trying to develop something similar and have a question about the attachment. 

I would like to attach a PDF. I have set content type to "application/json" and in the body I pass  decoded base64 text (%PDF-1.5 . . .)

The PDF is created, but it is always empty (it shows no text). 

What exactly has to be passed as binary and how does it have to be encoded?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Kind regards,

Sina

We are creating an application approval function using SAP Business Workflow.

In this process, we are considering a mechanism to send an email notification to the approver once an applicant has submitted an application.

Is there a way to include in that email a URL to access the approval screen associated with the application ID?

entry.title: Re: S4HC/应收票据认领问题

entry.title: Re: Extract peer SSL certificate automatically to resolve SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED
entry.content: For public Web sites, you may get it via your internet browser (click on the "https lock" in the address bar, etc.)

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a R...
entry.content:
This message

The method "ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT" does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expressions

means that you are doing a Functional Method Call (Functional Method Call - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com)), e.g. im_position = uo_model_holder->zzget_next_subview_count( ), but you have declared your method without any RETURNING parameter.

Instead of

 

METHODS ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT.

 

the solution could be for instance:

 

METHODS ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT
  RETURNING VALUE(result) TYPE i.

 

For more information about it, read:

METHODS, RETURNING - ABAP Keyword Documentation (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER"
entry.content: It's possible that you have moved your local class from one include to another, and you are activating only one include. Activate all the includes at the same time. It's also possible that you have 2 INCLUDE statements of the same include program, or two declarations CLASS lcl_custom_header, in that case fix your code.

entry.title: How to handle inventory of customer owned stock
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

I have a process where we have sold goods to a customer. GI and Invoiced.

The customer calls us and ask us if we can hold on to the goods for 6 month.

How do we handle this so we know how much we have in "stock" of the the customers materials?

We might also want to charge the customer for the storage service.

Thanks in advance,

Tom

entry.title: Re: wbmr was not created from the forwarding agreement
entry.content: The problem was resolve by soa customizing

entry.title: Re: SAP Material management Consultant level Certification
entry.content:
Hi @Aravindmanikan 
Depending on the product whether it is for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP S/4HANA or SAP ERP Procurement different certifications verify that the candidate has the fundamental and core knowledge in the receptive area:

C_TS452 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
The "SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement" certification exam verifies that the candidate has the fundamental and core knowledge in the area of sourcing and procurement required for the consultant profile. This certificate proves that the candidate has an overall understanding and can implement the knowledge practically in projects to contribute to the success of the planning and implementation phases in a mentored role. Previous project experience is not necessarily a prerequisite to pass this exam. This certification exam is relevant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP S/4HANA on-premise.
You can find the detail on our website 

C_TS422 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Production Planning and Manufacturing
This certification verifies that you possess the core skills required for the SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing consultant profile and proves that you have an overall understanding and in-depth technical skills to participate as a member of a project team in a mentored role.
You can find the detail on our C_TS422 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Production Planning and Manufacturing website 

C_S43 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management
This certification verifies that you possess the core skills in the area of Asset Management required for the consultant profile and proves that you have an overall understanding and can implement the skills practically in projects to contribute to the success of the planning and implementation phases in a mentored role. The certification is relevant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA on-premise.
You can find the detail on our C_S43 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management website 
 
C_S43 SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management 
This certification verifies that you possess the core skills in the area of Asset Management required for the consultant profile and proves that you have an overall understanding and can implement the skills practically in projects to contribute to the success of the planning and implementation phases in a mentored role. The certification is relevant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA on-premise.
You can find the detail on our SAP Certified Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management website 

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Historical Balances Migration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Shakeel_Ahmed 

Thank you for this blog, it's very helpful.

Just a follow-up question on the timing of historical data GL balance migration, can this be done anytime even after go live? 

Say my client has financial year 2025 - start July 2024 and ending June 2025 (Australia localization), and they will go live on 1st January 2025 (basically middle of financial year). The plan for migration cutover is migrate the Trial Balance as at 31/12/2024 with subsidiary ledgers balance 31/12/2024 (receivables being open/unpaid/uncleared customer invoices/credits, payables being open/unpaid/uncleared vendor invoices/credits, stock on hand, fixed asset, cash in bank); Legacy Data Transfer will be 31/12/2024, and Asset Accounting Transfer Date will be 31/12/2024.

Assuming go live happens successfully on 01/01/2025, and go live transaction postings are already ongoing during January 2025.

Can the historical balances migration still be done down the track, say from mid Jan 2025 or even few months after go live Feb 2025 or March 2025? Historical balance to be migrated will be 3 years (July 2021 to June 2022; July 2022 to June 2023; July 2023 to June 2024), plus the 5 months of current 2025 financial year (prior to go live) July 2024 to Nov 2024.

Please advice, thank you in advance.

Regards,

Cath

entry.title: Re: Is there a T-Code / Process knowledge & Training data...
entry.content:
Hi @ArnoudHoltzer 
This feature is currently no available on SAP Learning.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Using Optional Parameters in a Command Object
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the helpful blog.

However, I have an issue. If it is a multi-value parameter, and the values are the result of a select query, it's not working.

I created the report, subreport, and all needed formulas; everything works fine. Note I am using hana syntax, so for example my select is as follows:

SELECT DISTINCT T2."DocEntry", T2."CardCode"
FROM OINV T2
WHERE

(
{?businessPARTNER} IS NULL
OR {?businessPARTNER} = 'N/A'
OR {?businessPARTNER} = ''
OR LOCATE (CONCAT('-', CONCAT( T2."CardCode", '-')), {?businessPARTNER}) >0
)

But when I rename my multivalued parameter in the main report named Business-Partner to Business-Partner @select T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" from OCRD T0 where T0."validFor" = 'Y' order by T0."CardCode" it's not working. Actually in crystal report, I don't have a problem, but when previewing it in SAP, I click the button to select the business partners and the SAP system crashes. (it keeps loading until I exit it forcefully) 

Your help is appreciated 🙂 

@nscheaffer

entry.title: Re: wbmr was not created from the forwarding agreement
entry.content: That is good news. I am struggling with same issue. could you please share steps we need to execute or any reference document?

entry.title: Re: SAP EC Payroll (ECP) client copy and client refresh
entry.content:
Hello Manu,

 

1.) client copy is just another wording for client refresh

2.) basis team should be able to do this for you (maybe they need input from your application team in case of differences in your programs)

3.) unfortunately i can not answer this. but client copy should be possible on your own

 

your further questions i can not get in detail. what do you mean with "can we delete everything?" --> A client copy deletes all data in your target client before it will start with copy from your source client. check out following link https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/difference-between-remote-client-copy-and-client-import-export-remote/ba-p/13260487

a client copy just runs in between two dedicated clients (source and target)

br

entry.title: Re: Where should I place a firewall in my SAP landscape?
entry.content:
Dear @karl-heinz_hochmuth 

I'm working at a customer who plans to put the HANA databases to a high security network and the application servers to an application network zone (saprouter and reverse proxies+WAF to another, 3rd network zone). Between these network zones we have of course firewalls. Besides these we have a local firewall activated and configured on all of our servers (all SLES).

This separation of application servers from database servers is exactly what SAP and you are not recommending. The reasons for this are clearly mentioned in the blog and note. Now your blog is from 2017 and the note from 2018. When I now go to my network colleagues with this, they will say that the firewalls have become much better in the meantime. That it is no longer a problem at all to place the firewalls inbetween...

Can you say whether this will really no longer be a problem in 2024 or whether the facts from 2017/2018 still apply?

Thank you and best regards,
Gabi

entry.title: Re: Security Deposits Suppliers - Best Practice
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you or your question.

Here's the answer provided by the experts:

Hello Vanessa, there is no extra-license needed anymore to use Contract Accounting. But pre-condition for this functionality is the usage of Contract Accounting (FI-CA). You need to activate the scope items for FI-CA. But: FI-CA is a complete new subledger, in parallel to FI-AR/AP. That's not what customers typically do for single features FI-CA is capable of. Therefore before activation the feature you have to decide which subledger you want to use: either FI-CA or FI-AR.

Best regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: CPI Message mapping problems with arrays
entry.content: @manu_maca30 yes, but an XSLT is much easier.

entry.title: Re: GENERATIVE AI HUB SDK - Python Error
entry.content:
Hi! Since apparently you want to use the Langchain API, the `init_llm` function is likely a wrapper around the `ChatOpenAI` class, which is used to interact with OpenAI. Let me know how this goes

 

from gen_ai_hub.proxy.langchain.openai import ChatOpenAI
from gen_ai_hub.proxy.core.proxy_clients import get_proxy_client
from langchain.chains import LLMChain
from langchain.prompts import PromptTemplate

# Initialize proxy client
proxy_client = get_proxy_client('gen-ai-hub')

# Set up the chat model
chat_llm = ChatOpenAI(proxy_model_name='gpt-35-turbo', proxy_client=proxy_client)

# Define the prompt
prompt_template = PromptTemplate(input_variables=["text"], template="Translate to Danish: {text}")

# Create the LLMChain
chain = LLMChain(llm=chat_llm, prompt=prompt_template)

# Run the chain with the input text
response = chain.run("Guten Morgen")

# Print the output
print(response)

entry.title: Re: Deploy React app as HTML5 in Build work zone - with C...
entry.content: Hello Sreehari, Thanks for your confirmation and sharing Root cause.

entry.title: Re: orders idoc inbound problem status 51
entry.content:
Hello,

this error appears when the Idoc can not find a unique material in your sap system based on the value that was provided in the field IDTNR of the Segment E1EDP19 with qualifier 001( material number of the customer) or 002 (material number of the supplier) or 003 (GTIN number of the material).

That means you either have to many materials with same value from IDTNR or you don not have any material with that value.

In case you do not have any material with that value,  you need to maintain that value:

- in VD53 in case  Segment E1EDP19 001  - your need to maintain customer material info 

or

 - in MM01 in case of Segment E1EDP 002 - you nee to create material with that number

or

- in MM02 in case of the Segment E1EDP19 003 - you need to maintain "under Additional Data" the GTIN (EAN Number) that you received in the IDoc.

Best regards,

Elena

entry.title: Re: Where should I place a firewall in my SAP landscape?
entry.content:
Hello Gabi,

thanks for your question! In the past years we discovered a lot of new sophisticated "security devices". They do much, much more than only "firewalling" today. They analyze network packages, they try to recognize attack patterns, EDR functionality, DNS spoofing, DOS, ... and of course, today connected to a central AI system. All major vendors offer such products.

My observation at SAP support is still the same as in 2017! We still see sudden connection issues in high load situations and in most cases, if the network guys analyze their devices, everything is fine. No problems logged. But Windows logs the famous error 10054: "An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host.". One customer was able to reproduce this with a vulnerability scan from outside the network (= port scan). For some reason, the disp+work.exe processes on Windows lost their connection with the HANA database, error 10054. 

My advice:

Ask you security people why not to put the application servers in the same network as the HANA database?

I have also admit: We have also many customers with such super-secure network designs which work stable, even under high load. If you plan to do it, then I would at least recommend to configure the local Windows firewall to not scan additionally network packages. Turn all zones off.

Best regards,

Kalle

With regards to the third answer - if we create new customer-specific CR's based on best practice content, and in a future release, new regulation CR's that are relevant to our business does get supported, is it advised to transition to that regulation-based CR? entry.title: Re: HANA ODBC Error
entry.content: Hello gentlemen, we are facing the same problem, but with port calling and correct settings! It happens that after a period of working and requesting Hana through powerBi Microsoft, the connection is refused after a period of time! With the restart of Hana services, the problem is resolved for another period and will reoccur! Has anyone already found a solution?

entry.title: Re: Link with Rebate and Sales Order (scope item 1B6)
entry.content: Hi, please let me first correct you a little bit. The source documents for the sales rebate processing are billing documents released to accounting. To your question: It can happen that in a settlement run you process a large number of billing documents (for big CP companies it can be thousands) in an aggregated manner. I think this makes clear that you cannot link transactional documents and a settlement document directly. Instead, we save the linkage in a separate database table, called Detailed Statement. To display this detailed statement choose app ‘Analyze Detailed Statement for Sales Rebate’. Here you see which billing documents have been included in a settlement document.

entry.title: Re: CPI Message mapping problems with arrays
entry.content: @manu_maca30 I've updated the answer to include a pre-XSLT that you can execute to get the desired structure.

entry.title: Re: Regarding Process Automation Recorder not capturing status bar section of sap gui 7.7

entry.title: Re: EDI connection with WE20 and NACE
entry.content: You'll have to be more specific with your question because WE20 is exactly where you would setup the necessary parameters for IDoc -> EDI communication.

Thanks for a nice blog.

Regards 

Tom Kristensen

entry.title: Re: Demand Planning using historical sales data when just...
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud, there is sales planning solution(scope item: 1O0) in sales area, however there is no direct integration with demand side. based on my personal information, demand planning could be done with IBP(but as you said the customer didn't have that).

Since it's related with supply chain area, I also help you to add the Supply Chain tag, then our related expert may have some comments, hope this is from fine for you.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
My validation

Logic of ABAP Class

CLASS zcl_a19_travel DEFINITION

PUBLIC

FINAL

CREATE PUBLIC .

 

PUBLIC SECTION.

DATA: lt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF YDAJ19_travel.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .

PROTECTED SECTION.

PRIVATE SECTION.

METHODS: delete_data.

METHODS: Get_data.

METHODS: update_data.

ENDCLASS.

 

CLASS zcl_a19_travel IMPLEMENTATION.

 

METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.

DATA: lt_zcl_YADj19_travel TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF YDAJ19_travel WITH EMPTY KEY.

FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_travel> TYPE YDAJ19_travel.

 

me->delete_data( ).

me->get_data( ).

LOOP AT me->lt_data ASSIGNING <fs_travel>.

CASE <fs_travel>-status.

 

WHEN 'N'.

<fs_travel>-status = 'O'.

WHEN 'P'.

<fs_travel>-status = 'O'.

WHEN 'B'.

<fs_travel>-status = 'A'.

WHEN OTHERS.

<fs_travel>-status = 'X'.

ENDCASE.

 

ENDLOOP.

me->update_data( ).

ENDMETHOD.

METHOD update_data.

INSERT YDAJ19_travel from TABLE @me->lt_data.

ENDMETHOD.

METHOD delete_data.

* delete existing entries in the database table

DELETE FROM YDAJ19_travel.

ENDMETHOD.

 

METHOD get_data.

CLEAR me->lt_data.

SELECT client, travel_id, description, total_price, currency_code, status

FROM /dmo/travel

INTO TABLE @me->lt_data.

 

ENDMETHOD.

 

ENDCLASS.

 

***************

Status values available in the filter selection

I then followed the exact steps as detailed in the link https://blogs.sap.com/2019/10/20/concise-guide-to-install-sap-netweaver-developer-edition-on-ubuntu-...

But still I am getting the error as per attached screenshot. Can you please suggest?

Thanks,
Anirban

entry.title: Re: How to refresh currentUser after Google Oauth2 sign-in?
entry.content:
Hi Sankara,

There is no error message, there is just a successful signin response (further below) but with no currentUser update.
The successful callback returns an idToken, which I then use in the request body of the endpoint https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY] to authenticate the user and -as I thought- update the currentUser in the Firebase client SDK.
The signInWithIdp API call is made to authenticate the user with Firebase using their OAuth token.
After this request is successful, Firebase responds with an updated ID token (idToken) and user information (userInfo), yet the SAP Build Apps currentUser (firebase auth) flow function status remains idle or empty despite a reload, yet the authed user is in the firebase authentication console (see pic).
When the call is successful it returns this type of response:

- idToken: The Firebase ID token for the user.
- refreshToken: A token that can be used to refresh the ID token.
- localId: The user's unique identifier in Firebase.
- userInfo with email, displayName, uid, provider, etc.

entry.title: Re: How does Half day holiday displayed in table TFACS
entry.content:
Hi Shlomi, 

I would replicate (as remote table) the TFACS into a central space. 

Then either: 

# share to specific business spaces as view, where you can create a calculated column - half day

# create a view based on the TFACS in the central space with the calculated column - half day and share this view to business spaces directly. 

This way you have the logic in DSP and will not need to tackle any source system issues as with the factory calendar there are some discrepancies in S/4 releases as far as I am aware of. 

Martin

entry.title: SAP integration CBS handles the sending status change of the payment file
entry.content:
1、不能更该状态

处理付款文件APP:

发送给第三方支付平台CBS后，文件状态改为“已发送”，

CBS回传状态怎样映射到SAP，方便重处理


处理发票的付款项目APP

2、无法重新发送未付款成功的行项目

付款文件状态的API怎么获取，需要让CBS返回付款状态，映射SAP付款状态

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Supplier Invoice Reverse without invoice posting access/catalog
entry.content: @RyanMuller were you able to solve this issue? We have the same requirement and we also raised a case for it to which SAP responded stating that "The authorization for reversing and posting supplier invoices cannot be split. When you reverse a supplier invoice, the system posts a credit memo for the invoice data, which is the same as posting a credit memo. To better understand the posting logic for reversing an invoice, please refer to note 2684816. https://me.sap.com/notes/2684816"

entry.title: Recurring Posting via Standard background job
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way, wherein we can set up background job for posting recurring documents from F.14 & SM35 in one job ?

Regards,

Abhishek

entry.title: Re: SWAGTAG - I am a SAP Champion

entry.title: Re: Budget Availability Control and Commitments (SAP Proj...
entry.content: In order to consume budget the budget has to be created, budget availability has to be activated on the project and the external activity has to create the PR.  An External Activity does not consume budget by itself, it is the PR.  If that activity is set to Never then no budget will be consumed.

entry.title: The customer and supplier banks check the validation of the configuration point
entry.content: Is there a common check for customer and vendor banks to check configuration points? Where can I export this data?

entry.title: API for EWM Change Material/Batch
entry.content:
I have a request from the business to create a program to automate the changing of a batch/material after a quality inspection has been completed.

It is important to note that we use SAP Public Cloud so our options are limited to exposed API's.

The functional description is that once a material has been tested in QM, depending on the content of certain elements, the classification of the material could change (i.e.. Mixed Metals to Copper if it has a high Copper content which means we can sell it for more).

I know this can be done in the Warehouse Monitor by selecting the physical stock and using the worklist dropdown, use "Change Product or Batch".

Since there are many steps in the process, the business wants this automated. I have figured out all the steps up to this point but I cannot find any API methods to perform the same function.

I noticed when I do the transaction online, I see a Warehouse Task is created which is NOT tied to a Warehouse Order. I've tried to get the details of the Warehouse Task via the Warehouse Order/Task API but it cannot find the Task. I was hoping to get the details of what was created online so I could create my own Task via the API.

I investigated all options available with the Warehouse Order/Task and Handling Unit APIs but I've found nothing that allows me to change the material/batch.

Does anyone know if there is an API to perform the material/batch change on an EWM Handling Unit?

Jeff

entry.title: open and close periods changes reports
entry.content:
is there a way to make Open and Close Periods changes show as reports in SAP BYD


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: open and close periods changes reports
entry.content: currently, there is no report for open and close periods changes. You can check the changes in Open and Close period view>Changes tab. We request you to post your requirement in our Influence sap :  https://influence.sap.com/

Thanks in advanced

Mo

entry.title: Re: Hello experts. In a SAP S4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC implement...
